heading: It,s About Understanding What We See
We Already Know How To See
How We Go Against Nature and Burn Out
The Knowledge of Y.O.U (Your Own Understanding)
TRAITS
body: The natural physical traits that make you unique: The color of your hair and eyes, the shape of your face and other physical traits all provide unique insight into your natural talents, capabilities and potential.

heading: MOTIVATIONS
body: There are 12 motivators or "drivers" in everyone,s vehicle of self but only two are authentically in the front seat navigating us through life. Identifying what your two primary "drivers" are will help you to understand why you do things a certain way and what "fuel" you specifically need in order to thrive.

heading: BOUNDARIES
body: Boundaries address your personal preferences or level of refinement. Identifying and understanding your boundaries of tolerance for others and in environments will help you to maintain your energy and diffuse potential misunderstandings with others.
sub: We use the analogy of ore to describe this part of the knowledge.

heading: The Cycle of Life
sub1: Neat, Flexible, Practical, Solid, Durable and Adaptable

heading: COMMUNICATION STYLE
body: There are 4 Energy Centers: Emotional, Moving, Intellectual and Instinctual. Understanding what your primary Energy Center is will reveal the specific way you connect with your environment, relate to others and download information.

heading: THE INSTINCTUAL CENTER
sub:
Happiest Sensing Life

  • Look good
  • Sounds good
  • Smells good
  • Tastes good
  • Feels good

heading: THE INTELLECTUAL CENTER
sub:
Happiest entertaining new concepts

think rather then do

curl up with a good book

Engage in deep discussion

heading: THE MOVING CENTER
sub:
Happiest when physically moving

Connect when moving

Download information best when moving

heading: ENERGY POOL
body: Your ENERGY POOL is simply how much physical energy you have to spend each day. The range is between 25 and 35.
